# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Replaced ARM-based `AzureNameAvailabilityChecker` (required Azure auth) with DNS-based `DnsNameAvailabilityChecker`. Each resource type maps to its Azure DNS suffix (e.g. `{name}.azurecr.io`, `{name}.database.windows.net`). If the FQDN resolves → unavailable; NXDOMAIN → available. Zero authentication required — works for all users in a multi-tenant SaaS deployment. DI changed from `AddHttpClient` to `AddSingleton`. Interface `IAzureNameAvailabilityChecker` docs updated. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Fixed SqlServer `checkNameAvailability` returning 401: changed API version from retired `2023-08-01-preview` to stable `2021-11-01` in `AzureNameAvailabilityChecker`. Also fixed response deserialization — SQL Server returns `available` (not `nameAvailable`); refactored `CheckNameAvailabilityResponseBody` to handle both JSON shapes via `IsAvailable` computed property. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Enabled name availability checking for all 10 backend-supported resource types in `resource-edit.component.ts`. Replaced hardcoded `resourceType === 'ContainerRegistry'` with a `NAME_AVAILABILITY_TYPES` Set containing ContainerRegistry, StorageAccount, KeyVault, RedisCache, AppConfiguration, ServiceBusNamespace, EventHubNamespace, WebApp, FunctionApp, SqlServer. The existing generic `NameAvailabilityService`, HTML template, and signals required no changes. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Fixed SqlServer resource detail page failing to load: added SqlServer support to `resource-edit.component.ts` (imports, service injection, `ResourceData` union type, `loadResource()` switch, `buildGeneralForm()` branch, `buildSingleEnvForm()` case, `onSave()` case, `buildSqlServerEnvSettings()` helper) and `resource-edit.component.html` (general config section with version/administratorLogin fields, env TLS dropdown). Added `SQL_SERVER_VERSION_OPTIONS`, `SQL_MIN_TLS_OPTIONS` constants. Added i18n keys `SQL_SERVER_VERSION`, `ADMINISTRATOR_LOGIN`, `ADMINISTRATOR_LOGIN_PLACEHOLDER` to `RESOURCE_EDIT.FIELDS` in EN/FR. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Made diagnostic rule system async: `IDiagnosticRule.Evaluate()` → `EvaluateAsync()` returning `Task<IReadOnlyList<ResourceDiagnosticItem>>`, `IConfigDiagnosticService` and `ConfigDiagnosticService` updated with `Task.WhenAll` parallelization, existing rules (`AcrPullDiagnosticRule`, `KeyVaultAccessDiagnosticRule`) wrapped with `Task.FromResult`. New `NameAvailabilityDiagnosticRule` checks all resources with globally unique names against Azure ARM via `IResourceNameResolver` + `IAzureNameAvailabilityChecker` during pre-generation diagnostics. Rule code `NAME_UNAVAILABLE`, i18n keys added EN/FR. Consumers updated: `GetConfigDiagnosticsQueryHandler`, `GenerateBicepCommandHandler`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Fixed ARM template validation error for SqlServer: `SqlServerTypeBicepGenerator` now normalizes domain enum `V12` to ARM-accepted `12.0` via `NormalizeSqlServerVersion()`. Root cause: `InfrastructureConfigReadRepository` maps `Version.Value.ToString()` → `"V12"` (C# enum name), but ARM `Microsoft.Sql/servers` only accepts `"12.0"`. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Filtered project-detail abbreviation list to show only resource types actually used in the project. **Backend**: added `GetDistinctResourceTypesByProjectIdAsync` to `IResourceGroupRepository` / `ResourceGroupRepository` (queries AzureResource via TPT, returns class names), added `UsedResourceTypes` to `ProjectResult` and `ProjectResponse`, updated `GetProjectQueryHandler` to call the new method. **Frontend**: added `usedResourceTypes` to `ProjectResponse` interface, changed `abbreviationDisplayItems` computed signal to use `proj.usedResourceTypes` instead of all `RESOURCE_TYPE_ABBREVIATIONS` keys. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Fixed 3 Bicep deployment errors from release pipeline: (1) **BCP033** — `ParameterFileAssembler.ApplyEnvironmentOverrides()` now coerces string env-override values to the original C# type (`bool`/`int`/`long`/`double`) via `CoerceToOriginalType()` before serialization, preventing `'false'`/`'0'` string literals in `.bicepparam` files; (2) **BCP037** — `InjectContainerAppEnvVars` now inserts `env: envVars` BEFORE `resources: {` (container level) instead of AFTER `memory:` (inside `ContainerResources`); (3) Removed unused `sku` parameter and `SkuName` type from ContainerAppEnvironment module template. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Added configurable resource abbreviation overrides at both Project and InfraConfig levels. **Domain**: new `ProjectResourceAbbreviation` and `ResourceAbbreviationOverride` entities with `Id<T>` VOs, aggregate methods on `Project` and `InfrastructureConfig` (upsert + remove). **Persistence**: new EF Core configurations with unique indexes `(ProjectId, ResourceType)` / `(InfraConfigId, ResourceType)`, cascade delete, migration `AddResourceAbbreviationOverrides`. **Application**: Set/Remove commands+handlers+validators for both levels (regex `^[a-z0-9]+$`, max 10 chars), result DTOs, updated `GetInfraConfigResult`/`ProjectResult` with abbreviation collections. **Contracts**: `ResourceAbbreviationOverrideResponse`, `SetResourceAbbreviationOverrideRequest`. **Mapster**: entity→result→response mappings for both levels. **Catalog refactor**: `ResourceNameResolver.ResolveAbbreviation()` with config→project→catalog precedence, `NamingContextReadModel` extended with `ResourceAbbreviations` dictionary, all 6 generator call-sites (`GenerateBicepCommandHandler`, `GeneratePipelineCommandHandler`, `GenerateProjectBicepCommandHandler`, `GenerateProjectPipelineCommandHandler`, `InfrastructureConfigReadRepository.BuildNamingContext`) updated to merge overrides with catalog defaults. **API**: PUT/DELETE endpoints on `/infra-config/{id}/naming/abbreviations/{resourceType}` and `/projects/{id}/naming/abbreviations/{resourceType}`. **Frontend**: shared `EditAbbreviationDialogComponent`, abbreviation section in both config-detail and project-detail naming tabs, service methods, i18n EN/FR keys. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Fixed module reference disambiguation bug: when multiple resources share the same logical name (e.g., "ifs"), `ParentModuleIdReferences`/`ParentModuleNameReferences` now carry `(Name, ResourceTypeName)` tuples instead of plain names. All 6 `FirstOrDefault` lookups in `MainBicepAssembler` now match by both `LogicalResourceName` and `ResourceTypeName`. Fixes wrong `containerAppEnvironmentId` and `APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING` references pointing to `sqlDatabaseModule` instead of the correct modules. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Added `ExistingResourceIdReferences` to `GeneratedTypeModule` for cross-config parent resource ID resolution. When LAW is in a different config (existing resource, not local module), `BicepGenerationEngine` now detects it from `ExistingResourceReferences` and `MainBicepAssembler` emits `existing_{symbol}.id` instead of `module.outputs.id`. Fixes missing `logAnalyticsWorkspaceId` param in ApplicationInsights module call. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Fixed 9 Bicep compilation errors from Azure DevOps release pipeline: (1) removed `@secure()` on array param in kvSecrets module, (2) replaced lambda-based `toObject` with resource-collection-based `toObject` in kvSecrets outputs, (3) added `SecureParameters` concept to `GeneratedTypeModule` + wired in `MainBicepAssembler`/`ParameterFileAssembler` for required `@secure()` params without defaults, (4) SqlServer generator declares `administratorLoginPassword` as SecureParameter, (5) replaced nested for-expression with `map()` in StorageAccount blobs lifecycle rules, (6) added symbol validation in `InjectOutputDeclarations` to prevent cross-module output injection (BCP057), (7) added LAW auto-detection fallback for AppInsights/CAE when property-based lookup fails. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Added `PathSanitizer` in `GenerationCore`: replaces spaces/underscores with dashes, strips invalid path chars, collapses consecutive dashes. Applied in `PipelineGenerationEngine`, `AppPipelineGenerationEngine`, `MonoRepoBicepAssembler`, `MonoRepoPipelineAssembler`, `AppPipelineYamlHelper`, and `GenerateProjectBicepCommandHandler` so config names with spaces produce valid folder names, pipeline references, and artifact paths. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Fixed `.bicepparam` array formatting: `AppendLifecycleParameterAssignment` and `AppendCorsParameterAssignment` in `StorageAccountCompanionHelper` now use `sb.Append` (not `sb.AppendLine`) for the `param x = ` prefix, so the opening `[` is on the same line as `=`, producing valid Bicep. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Added live Azure resource name availability check (ContainerRegistry-first). New endpoint `POST /naming/check-availability/{resourceType}` resolves the per-environment generated name through the project/config naming templates, validates against `AzureNamingConstraints`, then calls Azure ARM `Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/checkNameAvailability` with `DefaultAzureCredential`. New `IResourceNameResolver` + `IAzureNameAvailabilityChecker` (typed `HttpClient`, returns `Unknown` on failure, never throws). Frontend integration in `resource-edit`: debounced (500 ms) `switchMap` check on the `name` field, signal-based per-env status panel reusing `.acr-inline-status` visual baseline. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Added `AzureNamingConstraints` catalog (19 resource types) and resource-type-aware validation in `NamingTemplateValidator`. `SetResourceNamingTemplate` and `SetProjectResourceNamingTemplate` validators now reject templates with chars invalid for the target resource type (e.g. hyphens for ContainerRegistry, uppercase for StorageAccount). |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Rewrote infra release pipeline artifact flow: CI publishes stable `drop` artifact, release consumes via `resources.pipelines` + `download: ci`, deploy job uses `checkout: none` + artifact-relative paths. Added CI artifact validation, release preflight (compiles `.bicep`/`.bicepparam` to JSON, legacy autofix for old `using 'main.bicep'` paths, directory-contents dump on failure). Removed dead `buildPipeline`/`buildVersion`/`artifactsPath` variables. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Documented Aspire MCP detection trap: `aspire run` with CLI `13.1.3` vs repo Aspire `13.2.0` can start the AppHost without becoming MCP-detectable. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | Fixed `.bicepparam` file naming mismatch: `ParameterFileAssembler` now uses `EnvironmentDefinition.ShortName` for file names (`main.dev.bicepparam`) while keeping full `Name` for the internal `param environmentName` value. Fixes pipeline release validation error `Could not find any file matching the template file pattern`. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Bulk refactors (10 commits): sealed all `EnumValueObject` subclasses, standardized response DTO IDs to `string` (API-002), added `.ProducesProblem(401)` to all 27 controllers, enforced Azure tag limits (key 512/value 256/max 15), extracted `RoleAssignmentDomainService`, renamed `GetByResourceIdAsync` → `GetByContainedResourceIdAsync`, consolidated Bicep identifiers to camelCase, replaced raw HttpClient with Refit for GitHub API, added `DbSet<AzureResource>` for polymorphic TPT queries, fixed ErrorOr to return all errors in non-validation branch. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Decoupled Aspire from the API project: removed `Aspire.Npgsql`, `Aspire.Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, ServiceDefaults reference. Moved DbContext registration, OTel, and health checks into Infrastructure DI. API can now be deployed standalone without any Aspire dependency. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | Merged `origin/main` into `copilot/ddd-002-seal-azure-resource-classes`, resolved memory-file conflicts semantically, and preserved the DDD-002 sealed-aggregate work. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | Sealed all concrete `AzureResource` aggregates in the domain model to enforce invariants and block uncontrolled inheritance (DDD-002). |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | Added the `audit-expert` agent, the `audit-workflow` skill, and `scripts/sync-audit-issues.ps1` with repo-backed label configuration in `.github/audit/config.json` to generate expert audits under `audits/` and reconcile GitHub audit issues across runs. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | Recreated the 66 GitHub audit issues from `docs/AUDIT-2026-04-14.md`, normalized the `phase:*` and `severity:*` label descriptions to remove mojibake, and recorded `FlorianDrevet/infra-pipeline-editor` as the default GitHub repository for this project. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | Consolidated the audit automation on Windows: added PowerShell entry points in `scripts/`, updated the scripts README, corrected the documented audit issue total to 62, removed the unnecessary PowerShell 7 requirement, and fixed mojibake by forcing UTF-8 reads of the `.sh` source files (validated from `cmd` through `powershell.exe` 5.1). |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | Added the `draw-io-diagram-generator` skill and refreshed `docs/architecture/infraflowsculptor-architecture.drawio` as an Azure deployment diagram centered on deployed resources and their interactions. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | Major consolidation: fixed Azure DevOps infra release validation/path/scope/service-connection/sparse-checkout issues, merged app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved `AgentPoolName` from `InfrastructureConfig` to `Project`, moved `ContainerAppEnvironment.LogAnalyticsWorkspaceId` to the aggregate root, added `DELETE /resource-group/{id}`, refactored `BicepAssembler`, improved generation UX with validating state, and corrected cross-resource FK cascade behavior for project deletion. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | Added application pipeline generation end-to-end, integrated GitNexus workflow plus `13-code-graph.md`, audited memory counts/endpoints via GitNexus, and finalized ContainerApp pipeline/runtime fixes (`DockerImageName`, per-env bicep params, ACR/UAI reactivity). |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | Completed the Assign Identity refactor across domain, CQRS, Bicep, frontend, and diagnostics, with nullable FK support on `AzureResource` for assigned UAI. |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | Standardized Windows-first/build-only conventions, fixed impact dialog i18n, and moved runtime stack/version fields into general configuration. |
| 2026-03-31 | copilot | Delivered the EventHubNamespace aggregate full-stack and redesigned the Configuration Keys tab. |
| 2026-03-30 | copilot | Added UAI-based ACR role assignment, refactored pipeline variable groups, introduced the Unit of Work pattern, and tightened domain code-quality conventions. |
| 2026-03-29 | copilot | Shipped the first real Azure DevOps pipeline YAML generation flow with `AzureResourceManagerConnection` support and tenant cleanup. |
| 2026-03-28 | copilot | Unified generation UX, introduced mono-repo pipeline generation, added secret/static app settings handling, and introduced the `architect` agent. |
| 2026-03-27 | copilot | Improved UAI grouping, fixed nullable value object handling, and moved StorageAccount CORS/lifecycle editing into the Storage tab. |
| 2026-03-26 | copilot | Redesigned StorageAccount CORS management, added storage queue/table Bicep generation, and renamed generated modules. |
| 2026-03-24 | copilot | Added LogAnalyticsWorkspace and ApplicationInsights end-to-end across the stack. |
